_comment: Hook snippets for .claude/settings.json. Copy the 'hooks' object in, or merge individual entries if you already have hooks. See README.md in this folder.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read f; case "$f" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.css|*.json|*.md) npx prettier --write "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true ;; esac; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -qE 'rm -rf (/|~|\$HOME)([^a-zA-Z0-9_-]|$)|git push.*--force.*(main|master)|git reset --hard|chmod -R 777|> ?/dev/sd|dd if=|mkfs' && { echo 'Blocked: dangerous bash pattern' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -qE '(^|/)(migrations|supabase/migrations)/' && { echo 'Blocked: applied migrations are immutable. Create a new migration file instead, or ask the human.' >&2; exit 2; } || exit 0
